chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI F.R.A. No. 07 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1.For order on office objection 2.For order on CMA No.4150/24 3.For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 None present for appellant ---------- None have been present in this lis since its date of institution i.e., 21.08.2024. None have appeared for appellant on last two dates of hearing. No intimation is received. It appears that appellant has lost interest in the matter. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
